Specialty Construction Chemicals

Protective Coatings

Special coatings used to protect structures from moisture, chemicals and environmental damage.

Range

Products in this Category

Efflorescence-Resistant Waterproof Primer

Primer that prevents salt deposits and improves coating life.

Eco Primer for Wall & Terrace Systems

Environment-friendly primer for surface preparation.

Fibre-Reinforced Crack Filler Paste

Paste used for filling cracks and improving durability.

Transparent Polymer-based Clear Waterproofing

Clear coating providing waterproofing without affecting surface appearance.

Consultancy Advisory

Ready to set up manufacturing for this product range?

Our consultancy advisory covers plant setup, formulation development and production stabilisation.
